seoTitle: Centennial Park vs Central Colo — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Centennial Park and Central Colo. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Centennial Park vs Central Colo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Centennial Park and Central Colo.
heading: Centennial Park vs Central Colo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Centennial Park, New South Wales and Central Colo, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Central Colo has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Centennial Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Centennial Park or Central Colo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Centennial Park has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Central Colo scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Centennial Park scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Central Colo scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Centennial Park or Central Colo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Central Colo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
